title: MTB Cross-Country Simulation
description: XC MTB race demands — punchy climbs, recoveries
purpose: XC MTB race demands — punchy climbs, recoveries

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/28. 10s at 200%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/28. 170-200% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Standing. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/28. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 10s.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:10 at 200%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 28.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/28. Duration: 2:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/28. You're building something real here. 26 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/28. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/28. 110% FTP. Keep 88-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 1:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 60% for 1:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 17% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 1:00 at 60%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 17% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 13 minutes of threshold work done. Block 1/4. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 95% at 88-95 rpm, Standing. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/4.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/4. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/4. 95% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 22% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 88-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 1:00 at 60%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 6/28. 0:40 at 140%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 140% FTP, Seated. 40s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 140% for 40s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 6/28. 140% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 6/28. 140% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 2:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 25% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 2:00 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 2:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 27% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 8/28. 0:10 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 32% complete. Rep 8/28. 200% at 82-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 22 minutes of work done. 48 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 8/28. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% complete. Rep 8/28. 200% for 10s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 9/28. You're 32% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/28. 110% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 9/28. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 9/28. Only 19 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 110% for 2:00. Execute each rep with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 35% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 60% for 1:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% FTP, 82-90 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 1:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 35% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 36% complete. Block 2/4. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2: 3:00 at 95%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 2: 3:00 at 95%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2: 95% for 3:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. 42 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 60% FTP, 82-90 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/28. 40s at 140%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 0:40 at 140%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 140%, 82-90 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 140% for 40s. Then 40min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 140% × 40s. Seated, 82-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 42% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 2:00 at 75%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 42% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 42% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 15/28. 50% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 15. 19min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50% through. This is your workout. Own it. 200% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 50% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 50% into session. 200%, 75-85 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 0min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 110% for 2:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 53% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 53% complete. 60% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 53% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 53% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 54% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 29 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 38 minutes in. 95% at 75-85 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 54% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 10 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 54% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 58% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 28 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 58% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 58% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 60% done. 8 intervals left. 27 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 20 of 28. Target: 140% FTP, 75-85 rpm. 8 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% through. This is your workout. Own it. 140% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 20/28. 42 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 8 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% complete. Rep 20/28. 140% for 40s. Finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 43 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 43 minutes of Z2 work. 75-85 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 43 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% done. 25 minutes left. This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science. Probably.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 25 minutes to go. Easy does it. 75% FTP. Build your engine.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 45 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 29min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 22 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 67% done. 6 intervals left. 22 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 22 of 28. Target: 200% FTP, 95-105 rpm. 6 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% done. 6 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 22/28. 48 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 6 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 22. 6 to go. 22 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 5 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% complete. 110% for 2:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 95-105 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 48 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 23/28. 110% FTP × 2:00. Seated. 5 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 71% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 71% complete. 60% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 71% done. 19 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 50 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 71% complete. 19 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 4/4. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 3 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 4/4. 72% complete. Hold 95% steady. 16 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 72% through. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness. Stay strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 16 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 4: 3:00 at 95%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 3 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 54 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 76% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 15 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 15 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 54 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 27/28. 78% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 78% complete. Rep 27/28. 140% at 95-105 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 27/28. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 78% into session. 140%, 95-105 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% for 2:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 95-105 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 2:00 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 95-105 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 56 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 58 minutes of work done. 10 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 58 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 81% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 85% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 85% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 85% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
